title: papaver dubium subsp. stevenianum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. stevenianum is a subspecies of the meadow poppy, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
